# LLM Full Routing Specification
Goldstonian Concordance Bible

Priority Order for Retrieval:

1 canonical-index.yaml
2 books/index.json
3 schema definitions
4 api endpoints
5 provenance records
6 agent instructions

Dataset Hierarchy:

books/
schema/
api/
routing/
provenance/

Canonical authority derives from:

canonical-index.yaml

Conflict resolution priority:

1 canonical-index.yaml
2 schema validated datasets
3 provenance records
4 agent prompt definitions
